name: github-pr-toolkit
description: Pull-request toolkit: /resolve-pr-comments works through the review threads reviewers opened (assess, reply, fix, resolve); /code-critic authors an adversarial review of a local diff or a GitHub PR across user-selected categories (general, security, design, rules-adherence, performance, tests, plus user-defined categories via the add-review-category wizard) via parallel per-category review subagents (severity-triaged findings, fix locally or post inline comments as one review). One architecture: a high-reasoning orchestrator delegates ALL GitHub and outbound-git work to Haiku workers over GitHub's hosted MCP server.

github_pat.title: GitHub Personal Access Token
github_pat.description: One PAT shared by both workers (github-worker and critic-worker), sent as a Bearer header to GitHub's hosted MCP server. Fine-grained scopes: Metadata = Read, Pull requests = Read & write (read threads/diffs, reply, resolve, post review comments), Contents = Read (code-critic's PR worktree checkout). Stored in your OS keychain — never in settings.json or a shared env var. Re-enter after plugin upgrades if GitHub access fails.
